auth.brandTagline: Love, friendship, and that special magic that only happens in Mallorca.
auth.brandTaglineLine1: Love, friendship, and that special magic
auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to continue, or sign up for free below.
auth.registerSubtitle: Sign up for free to start connecting.
auth.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not available right now.
auth.googleRequiresDevBuild: Google sign-in requires a development build. Run npx expo run:android (Expo Go is not supported).
auth.googleError: We couldn't sign you in with Google. Please try again.
auth.googlePlayServices: Google Play services are not available or out of date.
auth.googleDeveloperError: Google sign-in is not configured for this app build. Add the EAS APK signing SHA-1 fingerprint in Firebase Console, then rebuild.
auth.legalPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.socialComingSoon: Social sign-in will be available soon.
auth.tagline: Connect with real people in Mallorca
auth.subtitle: Find people who share your interest in making the most of the island.
auth.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with one upper, one lower and a number.
auth.termsAcceptIntro: I have read and I accept the
auth.privacyAcceptIntro: I have read and I accept the
auth.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms and Conditions
auth.privacyRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy
auth.resetSent: If your email is registered, we sent you a 6-digit code.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.
auth.verifyEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and tap the link to activate your account.
auth.verifyEmailResent: If the address is registered, we've sent the link again.
auth.verifyEmailNotYet: Your email is not confirmed yet. Open the link we sent you, then tap this button again.
auth.verifyEmailFooter: Don't see the email? Check your spam folder, or contact info@citasmallorca.es.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Citas Mallorca
onboarding.headlineBefore: Love, friendship and that special magic that only happens in
onboarding.subtitle: Find people who share your interest in making the most of the island.
onboarding.feature1Desc: We verify every profile for a safer community.
onboarding.feature2Desc: We connect you with people you'll enjoy.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.relationshipGoalRequired: Pick at least one relationship goal.
profile.ageRangeHelper: Set the age range for your matches.
profile.ageRangeInvalid: Min age can't be higher than max age.
profile.photosRequired: Add at least one photo to continue.
profile.photoPermissionMessage: Photo library access is required to upload photos.
profile.photosHint: Up to 6 photos. The first one is your cover.
profile.incomplete: To start matching you need: name, date of birth, gender, preference and at least one photo.
profile.safetyDesc: Report inappropriate behavior or block this user. Every report is reviewed by our team.
profile.reportUserHint: Tell us what happened — choose a reason and send
profile.blockUserHint: Hide this person from discovery, matches and chat
profile.unmatchHint: Remove this match — you can still report or block
profile.blockConfirm: You will no longer see each other. Continue?

discovery.empty: No compatible profiles right now. Check back later.

discovery.filterComingSoon: Advanced filters will be available soon.
discovery.superLikeComingSoon: Super likes will be available soon.

discovery.superLikeNoneLeftBody: You've used all {{limit}} Super Likes this week. They'll reset soon.

matches.title: Your matches
matches.unmatchConfirm: This match will be removed. Continue?

premium.title: Citas Mallorca Premium

moderation.reportSubtitle: Help us keep the community safe. Choose the reason that best describes the issue.

contentFilter.link: Links and website addresses are not allowed.
contentFilter.phone: Sharing phone numbers is not allowed.
contentFilter.social: Sharing social media accounts or external contact details is not allowed.
contentFilter.sexual: Sexual or explicit content is not allowed.
contentFilter.aggressive: Aggressive, hateful or harassing language is not allowed.
